name: Power Grid Relay Manipulation
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of electrical grid protective relays to cause cascading power outages, inspired by Industroyer/CrashOverride
root_objective: Manipulate protective relays to cause cascading power grid failure

nodes.title: Cause Cascading Power Grid Failure
nodes.description: Compromise protective relays at multiple substations to trip circuit breakers and cause cascading outage

nodes.title: Infiltrate Utility Corporate Network
nodes.description: Gain initial access to the electric utility's corporate IT environment

nodes.title: Spear-Phish Energy Sector Staff
nodes.description: Target engineers and dispatchers with sector-specific lures about grid regulations or outage reports

nodes.title: Exploit Internet-Facing OT Gateway
nodes.description: Compromise exposed remote access gateways or historian servers accessible from the internet

nodes.title: Pivot to Substation Control Network
nodes.description: Cross from corporate IT to the substation automation and relay management networks

nodes.title: Exploit Dual-Homed EMS Workstation
nodes.description: Compromise an Energy Management System workstation bridging corporate and control networks

nodes.title: Abuse VPN to Substation RTU
nodes.description: Use compromised credentials for the VPN connecting to remote substation RTUs

nodes.title: Compromise Protective Relays
nodes.description: Issue commands to protective relays using IEC 61850/IEC 104 protocols to trip circuit breakers

nodes.title: Send IEC 61850 GOOSE Trip Commands
nodes.description: Inject GOOSE messages to trip breakers, as demonstrated by Industroyer

nodes.title: Modify Relay Protection Settings
nodes.description: Upload altered relay configuration to change protection thresholds, causing misoperation during normal load

nodes.title: Disable Automatic Reclosing
nodes.description: Prevent automatic grid restoration after breakers trip to extend outage duration

nodes.title: Reprogram Recloser Logic
nodes.description: Modify auto-reclosing relay settings to prevent automatic restoration of power after trip events

nodes.title: Brick Relay Firmware
nodes.description: Overwrite relay firmware to permanently disable protection devices, requiring physical replacement
